serverPage.metaDescription: {{name}} is a listed {{country}} {{type}} server with {{current}} of {{max}} slots currently filled.
serverPage.fallbackDescription: {{name}} is currently listed in FiveM Tracker.
serverPage.activitySummary: {{name}} reached a peak of {{peak}} players in the last 30 days. On average, {{average}} players were recorded per sample, based on {{samples}} stored measurements.
serverPage.activitySummaryEmpty: There are not enough stored history points for {{name}} yet. This page will be expanded automatically with future cron imports.

analysis.title: 30-day server analysis
analysis.description: The tracker evaluates stored player counts, region, tags, map information, and updates so players can judge faster whether {{name}} matches their search. These values update automatically and make the server profile more distinct than a plain server listing.

profile.title: Server profile
profile.description: Structured fields that provide context for players and search engines.

technical.title: Technical details
technical.description: Metadata for analysis, attribution, and server comparison.

serverPage.faqDescription: Short answers from the available live and history data.

currentPlayers.question: How many players are currently on {{name}}?
currentPlayers.answer: {{current}} of {{max}} slots are currently filled on {{name}}.

record.question: What player record does {{name}} have in the tracker?
record.answer: The highest measured value in the last 30 days is {{peak}} players{{date}}.
record.empty: No reliable 30-day record has been calculated for {{name}} yet.

country.question: Which country is {{name}} from?
country.answer: {{name}} is assigned to the {{country}} region in the tracker.

join.question: How can I join {{name}}?
join.answer: You can open {{name}} using join ID {{joinId}} or the FiveM connect link on this page.
join.empty: No join ID is currently stored for {{name}}.

related.title: Similar FiveM servers
related.description: More active servers from the same region or with a similar game mode.
related.empty: No matching similar servers found yet.

nav.title: FiveM Tracker
